name: Alex Platformpioneer
title: Platform Engineer · Developer Experience
tagline: Builds paved roads without putting up toll booths.
factoids: Maintains an internal developer portal used by sixty teams.
Measures platform success by how few tickets developers need to open.
jokes: Our golden path is mostly YAML painted yellow.
I built a self-service platform. It immediately asked me for support.

interaction.greeting: Hey! Are you building a platform, or has a platform started building you?
dialogue: A good abstraction removes decisions without hiding escape hatches.
Talk to your developers before choosing another portal plugin.
